title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Metro Shoes Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Metro Shoes Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes Advisory Limited:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes Advisory Limited!
